complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.为产品定义 **Mark 点**、**子板标记** 与 **独特标记**，让系统: Define a product's **Mark Points**, **Sub-board Markers**, and **Unique Markers** so the system can reliably locate the actual PCB position before every inspection:
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.**子板标记（Sub-board Marker）**：拼板产品中为每个子板单独细: **Sub-board Marker**: refines alignment per sub-board on panelized products (optional).
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.仅适用于 **拼板产品**（一块大板上含多个子板）。常规 Mark 点为整块拼板: Only for **panelized products** (one large board carrying several sub-boards). Regular Mark Points give the whole panel one shared position / rotation compensation; when the sub-boards shift or deform slightly relative to each other and need **per-sub-board** alignment refinement, use **Sub-board Markers** instead.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.点击工具栏的 :ui-btn:`+ 子板标记`，在 **任意一个子板的拼板区域内: Click :ui-btn:`+ Sub-board Marker` on the toolbar and box a reference mark **inside the panel region of any one sub-board**. A sub-board marker's shape type (Circle / Rectangle / Template), :ui-btn:`Locate`, :ui-btn:`Predict Center`, and :ui-btn:`Refine` work the same as a regular Mark Point.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.**创建即自动套用到每个子板**：在一个子板上画好后，系统会按拼板布局自动复制到: **Created once, applied to every sub-board**: after you draw it on one sub-board, the system copies it to all the others according to the panel layout; the list on the left shows one row per sub-board marker (the base sub-board).
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.**逐个子板微调**：之后调整某个子板上的标记时，只影响该子板，不会改动其他子板: **Per-sub-board tuning**: editing the marker on one sub-board afterwards affects only that sub-board, not the others.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.**预测中心** 会对拼板内 **每一个子板** 分别检测标记中心，并把结果分别: **Predict Center** detects the marker center on **every sub-board** in the panel and applies each result to its own sub-board.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.子板标记必须画在 **拼板区域（panel）内**。若画在拼板区域之外，系统会拒: A sub-board marker must be drawn **inside a panel region**. If drawn outside a panel region, the system rejects it and shows **Sub-board marker must be placed inside a panel.** So define the panel (sub-board layout) in :doc:`pcb_array` first, then add sub-board markers.
complete_user_guide/features/mark_align_.独特标记 OCR 分类方法下出现的 编辑距离阈值 输入框: Edit distance threshold input that appears when the unique marker uses the OCR classification method

complete_user_guide/features/part_librar.导入完成后，系统以提示消息汇总结果，例如\"导入完成 — 新增 X 个，覆盖 Y: When the import finishes, a message summarizes the result, for example "Import complete — X added, Y overwritten, Z skipped"; if some templates fail to import, the message also appends "N failed".
